issues: IMPRECISE LEGAL CITATION: Article states the Fernsignatur is 'durch die eIDAS-Verordnung (Art. 29, Erwägungsgrund 52) ausdrücklich als zulässige Form der QES anerkannt'. This is imprecise. In the original eIDAS 910/2014, Art. 29 addresses general requirements for qualified signature creation units (Anhang II), not specifically Fernunterschrift. The explicit framework for qualified remote signature creation units (Art. 29a) was introduced in the 2024 consolidated version. Erwägungsgrund 52 in the original 910/2014 concerns delegated custody to third parties — relevant but cited here as if Art. 29 explicitly names Fernunterschrift as a form of QES, which it does not in those terms.

IMPRECISE DEFINITION CITATION: The Technische Details section states 'Die eIDAS-Verordnung (EU) 910/2014 definiert in Art. 3 Nr. 23, dass eine QES-Erstellungseinheit auch eine Fernunterschriftserstellungseinheit sein kann'. Art. 3 Nr. 23 in the original 910/2014 defines 'qualifizierte elektronische Signaturerstellungseinheit' generally. The term 'qualifizierte elektronische Fernsignaturerstellungseinheit' and its definition via Art. 29a appear in the 2024 consolidated version (02014R0910-20241018). The article should either cite the consolidated 2024 version or rephrase.

STALE URL: Source link 'TI-Gateway - gematik Fachportal' points to https://fachportal.gematik.de/hersteller-anbieter/komponenten-dienste/konnektor. This is an outdated path — Playwright confirmed a redirect to https://fachportal.gematik.de/telematikinfrastruktur/komponenten-dienste/konnektor.
All required sections present. 11 wiki-links, all relevant. Technical process description (HSM, Authentisierung, Schlüsselpaar) is accurate.
articles.fixInstructions: 1. Revise the eIDAS citation in Überblick: replace '(Art. 29, Erwägungsgrund 52)' with '(Erwägungsgrund 52; in der konsolidierten Fassung 2024 explizit als Art. 29a geregelt)'. 2. Revise in Technische Details: replace 'Art. 3 Nr. 23' with 'der konsolidierten Fassung 2024 (Artikel 29a)' to correctly cite where the Fernsignaturerstellungseinheit is defined. 3. Update the TI-Gateway source URL from https://fachportal.gematik.de/hersteller-anbieter/komponenten-dienste/konnektor to https://fachportal.gematik.de/telematikinfrastruktur/komponenten-dienste/konnektor.

issues: INACCURATE FRAMING: Article states 'In Deutschland gibt es 17 Landesärztekammern, eine je Bundesland (Bayern und Sachsen haben je eine, Hamburg und Berlin je eine)'. The parenthetical lists four states that each have one chamber, which is true of nearly every state and explains nothing. The actual reason the count is 17 rather than 16 is that Nordrhein-Westfalen has TWO chambers (Ärztekammer Nordrhein and Ärztekammer Westfalen-Lippe). The article omits this entirely.

issues: FACTUAL ERROR: Article states 'Rechtsgrundlage ist § 25 der Strahlenschutzverordnung (StrlSchV)'. This paragraph number is incorrect. The current StrlSchV 2018 (in force since 1. Januar 2019) regulates Teleradiologie in § 123 StrlSchV. The predecessor was § 3 Abs. 4 RöV (Röntgenverordnung). § 25 StrlSchV governs a different subject matter. The error appears in the Überblick section and in the comparison table in Technische Details.
UNVERIFIABLE CLAIM: '30 Minuten Befundung' as a statutory deadline. The text of § 123 StrlSchV uses 'unmittelbar' and 'sofort' but does not specify a 30-minute limit.
articles.fixInstructions: 1. Replace all occurrences of '§ 25 der Strahlenschutzverordnung (StrlSchV)' with '§ 123 der Strahlenschutzverordnung (StrlSchV 2018)'. 2. Replace the '30 Minuten' claim with the actual statutory language: 'Der Teleradiologe muss unmittelbar erreichbar sein und den Befund sofort nach Bildübermittlung erstellen (§ 123 StrlSchV).' 3. Add source: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/strlschv_2018/__123.html

The gematik wiki source (TI-Messenger Compass blog) may require a gematik account to access. URL is valid but not fully public.
Requirement numbers and product assignment (A_26015-02 for ePA variant, A_28755 for Pro) verified correct.
articles.fixInstructions: Add the TI-Messenger_26_1 gemspec release page as a more publicly accessible additional source: https://gemspec.gematik.de/releases/TI-Messenger_26_1/index.html

contradictions.articleA: content/technologies/Patientenportal.md states ISiK is published by BfArM in collaboration with gematik and HL7-Usergroup
contradictions.articleB: content/standards/ISiK.md correctly states ISiK is developed by gematik under §373 SGB V; gematik.de/anwendungen/isik and fachportal.gematik.de confirm gematik as sole publisher
content/technologies/ePA.md references BITMARCK as plain text without a wiki-link; no BITMARCK article exists in the knowledge base

staleArticles: content/processes/DMP.md: Presents all 11 G-BA-Indikationen as equally active — 3 (Adipositas KiJu, Herzinsuffizienz, Rückenschmerz, Depression) are still in Umsetzungsphase and not yet enrollable per BAS Stand Januar 2026.
content/infrastructure/IDP.md: RSA 2048 listed as 'gültig bis Ende 2025' — this deadline has elapsed (current date: 19.03.2026); should be updated to note transition to ECDSA is complete.
content/standards/IVDR.md: Class D transition deadline (26. Mai 2025) is a past date but not explicitly noted as elapsed; readers may be confused about whether it is upcoming.
content/technologies/Teleradiologie.md: references §25 StrlSchV for Teleradiologie — current law since 1. Januar 2019 is §123 StrlSchV 2018 (carried from previous cycle)

content/technologies/Fernsignatur.md: cites eIDAS Art. 29 and Art. 3 Nr. 23 for Fernunterschrift — Art. 29a (explicit Fernsignatur framework) was added in the 2024 consolidated eIDAS (carried from previous cycle)

keyIssues: DMP.md: [[BAS]] wiki-link broken 3 times — highest priority fix, causes test failure; also needs clarification that 3-4 DMP-Indikationen are still in Umsetzungsphase and not yet enrollable.
TI-Pauschale.md: Two of four sources are commercial trade press; replace with official KBV publications.
Patientenportal.md FACTUAL ERROR (carried): ISiK attributed to BfArM — must be corrected to gematik. Dead URL simplifier.net/isik-basis-v4 must be replaced.
ePass.md (carried): broken wiki-link [[BITMARCK]] — no article exists; either create BITMARCK article or plain-text the reference.

No cross-article contradictions in new articles: Orientierungswert 2026 (12,7404 Cent) stated consistently in EBM.md, Bewertungsausschuss.md and TI-Pauschale.md; ePA launch dates consistent across all articles.
KHVVG.md and PEPP.md fully pass — all key facts verified against authoritative sources.

Carried unresolved: Teleradiologie.md (§25 vs §123 StrlSchV), Fernsignatur.md (eIDAS Art. citations), BfDI.md (Amtsantritt date), eArztbrief.md (EBM Cent), TA1.md and Apothekenrechenzentrum.md (NOVENTI lineage), IDP.md (RSA 2048 outdated).
